mission.title: n8n: basic auth, n8n form. Problem submitting response
mission.description: basic auth, n8n form. Problem submitting response. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current n8n deployment
steps.description:
Verify your n8n version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
helm list -n n8n 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working n8n installation.

steps.title: Review n8n configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n
```
### Bug Description

N8n Form has basic auth enabled and a Next Form Page. When I go to it, I get "Problem submitting response.

steps.title: Apply the fix for basic auth, n8n form. Problem submitting response
steps.description:
1. **Core Fix** (`packages/nodes-base/nodes/Form/utils/utils.ts`)
   - Modified `formWebhook()` to only validate authentication on GET requests
   - Added comment explaining the rationale
   - Moved `method` variable declaration earlier for clarity

2. **Template Fix**
```yaml
n8n version: 1.123.6
Plan: Pro (Cloud)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "basic auth, n8n form. Problem submitting response" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
1. **Core Fix** (`packages/nodes-base/nodes/Form/utils/utils.ts`)
   - Modified `formWebhook()` to only validate authentication on GET requests
   - Added comment explaining the rationale
   - Moved `method` variable declaration earlier for clarity

2.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with n8n installed or the issue environment reproducible.
